title: Arcane Dragons [NEOFORGE]
description: [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/787e3b703be86de33c24025c690f4bc9ef61b6d4.png)
# ABOUT
Use your elemental magic to defeat dragons, monsters and bosses. Explore structures and conquer dungeons. The ultimate fantasy world focused on adventure, exploration and questing. Designed for 100 days challenges, hardcore singleplayer and multiplayer servers.
> Arcane Dragons is a sequel to [Dragon Realm](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm) updated to Minecraft 1.21.1 and this is the NEOFORGE version of the modpack. Fabric version here.

![BH](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca28c1bd-8c0e-4625-bda1-43965a48650c.webp)
# FEATURES
* 100+ Quests
* Fully Optimized with Shader Support
* Elemental Magic (Iron Spells And Spellbooks)
* Dragons and Other Mythical Creatures (Ice And Fire CE)
* New Bosses and Mobs (Bosses Of Mass Destruction, Cataclysm, Bosses' Rise, Qlipoth)
* Completely Overhauled World Generation (Biomes O' Plenty, Geophilic)
* Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures (Dungeon Crawl, When Dungeons Arise, AdoraBuild: Structures, Repurposed Structures, Formations, Moog's Structures)
* 8 Dimensions Featuring The Twilight Forest, The Aether, The Undergarden, The Bumblezone and The Otherside
* New weapons, Tools and Armor
* Increasing health based on unique foods eaten (Spice Of Life)
* QoL Features such as Waystones and XP Storage
* Multiplayer features such as Simple Voice Chat
* Xaero's Minimap with Additional Features
* Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience
* 300+ Mods

# MY MODPACKS
* [Rising Legends](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rl-craft) [1.20.1] RLCraft Recreated For Modern Minecraft Versions.
* [Arcane Dragons [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcanedragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Arcane Dragons [NEOFORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcane-dragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Dragon Realm [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [Dragon Realm [FORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm-forge) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [FEAR](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fear) [1.20.1] The Ultimate Horror Modpack.
* [The Better Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-vanilla-fabric) [1.21.X] Vanilla with improved visuals and performance.

# VIDEOS
Send me your videos on Discord and you will be featured here.
